annotations.implementation_hint: Use LoadImage + optional resize/denoise node only when input fails acceptance thresholds.
Constrain denoise to preserve identity and avoid shape drift.
Attach optional branch for neutral background and simple contact shadow refinement.
Apply output checklist and ratio export utility before commercial delivery.

guardrails: Reject out-of-scope cases early (reflective extremes, difficult transparency).
Never claim microtypography-perfect reconstruction in V1.
If edge halos persist after two attempts, classify as usable-with-revision or out-of-scope.
